steps.title: Find the highest graph value
steps.content: The question asks for the highest percentage of lithium recovered. In the graph, the tallest bar is for Type B Process 2, which reaches about 76% on the y-axis.

steps.title: Match the closest percent
steps.content: Choice B, choice C, and choice D are far below the tallest bar's value. The closest listed value to about 76% is 75%. The answer is A.
